name: Oracle Social Cloud
description:
Social media management is tough, and some days have social media managers wishing for an oracle. Well, if that sounds like you, then Oracle Social Cloud is exactly what you’re looking for. An enterprise analytics powerhouse, its keen insights help you understand the ebbs, flows, and pettiness of social media algorithms.

Here’s why it’s perfect for your enterprise:

  • Enjoy custom pricing based on the scale and integration needs
  • Advanced social analytics give you in-depth insights into audience behavior and campaign performance
  • Monitor and engage with social conversations globally with social listening and engagement. No need to go off-platform to see what people are saying about you (and respond back)
  • Content management is a breeze. You can create, curate, and publish content across multiple platforms with ease
  • Supported platforms include Facebook, X, Instagram, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and more

Key Features:

✅ Enterprise-level analytics

✅ Global social listening

✅ Integrated content management
what_people_say:
What people say :

Oracle Social Cloud is beloved by large organizations for its comprehensive tools that cover social listening, engagement, content creation, and deep analytics. Its robust platform is designed to seamlessly integrate with other enterprise systems, making it a top choice for data-driven social media strategies.

Here’s what users think:

“Oracle Social Cloud offers unparalleled analytics depth. Once we were fully onboarded, we couldn’t believe we didn’t join sooner.”

“It’s an all-in-one solution for large-scale operations, though integration with existing systems can be challenging."
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Simplified user experience for ease of adoption
  • 🚫 Streamlined integration process with other enterprise systems
  • 🚫 Multi-brand support
  • 🚫 More flexible pricing options for various business sizes
